type: PROPOSE

type: REVISE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
your_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: We both need this same file for a small additive change, so let's serialize instead of splitting by file. Plan: I'll insert 'ssn = Regex(...)' immediately after the existing isbn definition (currently lines 68-70) using a targeted Edit (not a full-file overwrite). Go ahead and add your hash_sha256 definition elsewhere in the file (e.g. further down, in a different block) using targeted Edit too - non-overlapping anchors mean no clobbering. I'll send DONE once mine is in; feel free to proceed in parallel since edits are on different lines, just use Edit (unique string match) not Write (full overwrite).

No line-range overlap expected.
